name: Fast & Fit Sunny Pizza Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Canned water-packed tuna (drain and chunk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle 1 tbsp of the cornmeal over the side and bottom of a greased 9-inch glass pie plate.
2. In a bowl, combine whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, remaining cornmeal, baking powder, baking soda, basil, and salt. Mix in buttermilk and olive oil. Knead dough about 10 times until smooth.
3. Press the dough evenly over the bottom and up the sides of the pie plate.
4. Top with broccoli, onions, olives, tuna, artichokes, thyme, pepper, and cheese.
5. Bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for about 25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown on the bottom. If desired, broil for 2-3 minutes to brown the cheese.
Other nutritious ingredients may be substituted for tuna if desired.
